---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the workflow or documentation
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What is the user-facing problem you are trying to solve? Avoid jumping straight to a solution.

## Proposed change

What change to the workflow or the docs would solve it? If you can sketch the node graph or the diff, do so.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why did you discard them?

## Scope check

- [ ] This change does not add a new third-party integration without a corresponding update to [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
- [ ] This change does not require committing real credentials or production data.
- [ ] If this touches the workflow JSON, I am willing to test the change on my own n8n instance.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, prior art.
